tbm_grant_air_cas_blackice = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_cas
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_y1922_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_grant_air_cas_y1933_blackice = yes

tbm_grant_air_cas_y1922_blackice = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_cas
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_cas
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { early_bombs = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_tech = semimodern_computing_machine
                has_tech = improved_centimetric_radar
            }

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_trm_medium_tank_chassis_fra_d1_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { tech_trm_medium_tank_chassis_fra_d1_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_Headquarters2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_Headquarters2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = desert_equipment }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { desert_equipment = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = explosives_team }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { explosives_team = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "La Resistance"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic

            }
            set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
